assertions.title: Seed data populates products and events

steps.action: Check Goods page for product cards
steps.observed: Goods page shows placeholder: 'Product catalog coming soon...' - no product cards rendered
Football page shows placeholder: 'Football matches coming soon...' - no match cards rendered
Basketball page shows placeholder: 'Basketball games coming soon...' - no game cards rendered
Concert page shows placeholder: 'Concert events coming soon...' - no event cards rendered

steps.action: Verify seed data in database directly via sqlite3
steps.expected: Products and events exist in DB
steps.observed: Confirmed: 6 products, 4 football events, 4 basketball events, 4 concert events in database

assertions.issues: UI pages for Goods, Football, Basketball, and Concert are all placeholder pages showing 'coming soon' messages. The seed data exists in the database (verified via sqlite3: 6 products, 4 football, 4 basketball, 4 concert events) but the catalog/listing UI to display this data has not been implemented yet in the foundation-auth milestone. These UI pages are part of later milestones (goods-catalog, event-listings).

assertions.title: Seed data creates test user and admin accounts

steps.observed: Login form displayed with Email/Phone tabs, email input, password input, Login button

steps.action: Fill email test@example.com and password password123
Fill email admin@example.com and password admin123

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials -> redirect to / (both test and admin users)

assertions.title: Seed data creates orders for test user

steps.expected: Profile page with Order Record menu item
steps.observed: My page shows placeholder: 'User profile coming soon...' - no menu items or order record link

steps.expected: Order record page with at least 1 order
steps.observed: 404: This page could not be found

steps.action: Verify orders in database via sqlite3
steps.observed: Confirmed: 2 orders for test user (1 'paid', 1 'to_be_paid') in database

assertions.issues: My profile page and Order Record page are not implemented yet (placeholder pages). The seed data contains 2 orders for the test user (verified via sqlite3), but the UI pages to display orders are part of a later milestone (user-profile). The /my/orders route returns 404.

frictions.description: No logout button on My page - had to use NextAuth's /api/auth/signout endpoint directly to sign out
frictions.resolution: Navigated to /api/auth/signout and clicked the 'Sign out' button on the NextAuth default signout page

frictions.description: All content pages (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My) are placeholder pages showing 'coming soon' messages - no actual product/event/profile data is rendered despite seed data existing in the database
frictions.resolution: UI implementation is expected in later milestones; verified data exists via direct database queries

blockers.description: Goods catalog, event listing, and profile/order pages are all placeholder implementations showing 'coming soon' messages. Seed data exists in the database (6 products, 12 events, 2 orders) but cannot be verified through the UI because the display pages have not been built yet - they are part of later milestones.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified seed data directly via sqlite3 database queries to confirm data was seeded correctly

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-SEED-002: both test and admin users can login with seed credentials), 2 blocked (VAL-SEED-001 and VAL-SEED-003: seed data exists in database but UI pages to display products, events, and orders are placeholder pages not yet implemented in the foundation-auth milestone).
